name: exportStudy
description: Describe how to export a study as a ZIP archive (.jzip) from JATOS via the HTTP API. This tool does not perform the export itself. It provides instructions and a curl command template for downloading the study archive.

studyIdOrUuid.description: The numeric ID or UUID of the study to export.

success.description: True if the download instruction generation succeeded.

message.description: A message that describes the result of the operation.

curlCommand.description: A fully-formed curl command to download the study .jzip file. Copy and paste into a terminal.

fileName.description: Suggested file name for the exported .jzip.

downloadUrl.description: The direct URL to the study archive on the JATOS server.
